ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "bot_score_english" REAL /* Bot detection score for the user (English version) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "creation_source" TEXT /* Source of the user account creation */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., post, comment, like) */,
  "activity_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the activity (e.g., post_like, post_comment, comment_reply) */,
  "activity_target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity target (e.g., post ID, comment ID) */,
  "activity_target_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity target (e.g., post, comment) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity (e.g., post ID, comment text) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "activity_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the activity type (e.g., content_creation, interaction, engagement) */,
  "activity_type_weight" REAL /* Weight of the activity type for engagement calculations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bot_detection_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bot detection metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bot_score_english" REAL /* Bot detection score for the user (English version) */,
  "bot_score_other" REAL /* Bot detection score for the user (other language version) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the bot detection was last checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bot detection (e.g., pending, confirmed bot) */,
  "bot_detection_score_threshold" REAL /* Threshold score for bot detection */,
  "bot_detection_algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the bot detection algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bot_detection_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions the user has had on the platform */,
  "activity_level" REAL /* Activity level of the user (e.g., average interactions per day) */,
  "last_engagement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last engagement */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Comprehensive engagement score for the user */,
  "engagement_category" TEXT /* Category of the user's engagement level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., issue, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feedback (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the platform's response to the feedback */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response to the user's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "session_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the user's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the user's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "location_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the user's location */,
  "location_source" TEXT /* Source of the user's location (e.g., IP address, GPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_locations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* Notification preference (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Notification frequency (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "theme_customization" TEXT /* Custom theme settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
